title: Issei Hyoudou vs. Raynare
fact: Issei's first real battle where he summons his Boosted Gear for the first time to avenge Asia Argento. He successfully defeats the Fallen Angel Raynare with the assistance of the Gremory Peerage.

title: Gremory Peerage vs. Phenex Peerage
fact: The official Rating Game held to determine Rias's marriage fate. Despite a brilliant tactical showing by Rias, she ultimately forfeits to save Issei's life from Riser's immortal flames.

title: Issei Hyoudou vs. Riser Phenex
fact: Issei crashes Rias's engagement party and challenges Riser to a duel using a Holy Water vial and a dragon-sacrificed arm. He defeats the immortal devil by repeatedly boosting and transferring power to a holy cross item.

title: Kuoh Alliance vs. Kokabiel
arc: Birth of the Breast Dragon Emperor Arc
fact: The rogue Cadre Kokabiel attempts to start another Great War by destroying Kuoh Town with stolen Excaliburs. While the students hold their ground, the battle ends abruptly when Vali Lucifer arrives under Azazel's orders to arrest Kokabiel.

title: Issei Hyoudou vs. Vali Lucifer
arc: Birth of the Breast Dragon Emperor Arc
fact: The first major clash between the current Welsh Dragon and Vanishing Dragon. Issei unlocks Balance Breaker ahead of schedule by stealing Vali's dividing power, forcing a tactical retreat from the White Dragon Emperor.

title: Three Factions Alliance vs. Loki
fact: The Norse God of Mischief tries to trigger Ragnarok by summoning Fenrir. A joint strike force of young Devils and the Vali Team successfully defeat him using Mjolnir replicas provided by Odin.

title: Issei Hyoudou vs. Diodora Astaroth
fact: Driven by rage over Asia's capture and Diodora's twisted manipulations, Issei completely overpowers the pure-blood devil using his advanced Scale Mail form. Diodora is left broken before fleeing to his final demise.

title: Issei Hyoudou vs. Shalba Beelzebub
fact: Believing Asia was permanently killed, Issei triggers the forbidden Juggernaut Drive, wiping out Shalba's forces and lethally wounding the Old Satan descendant with absolute, uncontrollable dragon power.

title: Gremory Peerage vs. Bael Peerage
arc: Legend of the Oppai Dragon and His Lively Companions Arc
fact: A monumental Rating Game match between the top two young Devil group leaders. The match serves as a display of peak peerage synergy, culminating in the historic downing of the Bael faction.

title: Issei Hyoudou vs. Sairaorg Bael
arc: Legend of the Oppai Dragon and His Lively Companions Arc
fact: The legendary physical showdown of the Volume 10 Rating Game. Issei unlocks his Cardinal Crimson Promotion form to counter Sairaorg's breakdown-beast armor, winning the fist fight by an incredibly narrow margin.

title: DxD Alliance vs. Cao Cao
arc: Legend of the Oppai Dragon and His Lively Companions Arc
fact: The Hero Faction leader Cao Cao uses the True Longinus to systematically overwhelm the supernatural beings in Kyoto. Issei and Vali cooperate to break through Cao Cao's tactical vision and force a withdrawal.
